session.user:
Run pytest on the following test files and report results: 1. tests/unit/gateways/github/test_real.py 2. tests/tui/data/test_provider.py
Run them as: uv run pytest tests/unit/gateways/github/test_real.py tests/tui/data/test_provider.py -x -v
Report all failures, errors, and their full tracebacks.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on those test files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on GitHub gateway and TUI data provider tests

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 57 items
tests/unit/gateways/github/test_real.py ..................... [ 36%] tests/tui/data/test_provider.py .................................... [100%]
============================== 57 passed in 0.85s ==============================
